repo.startingStatus: clean and synced after git fetch origin

sectionsAudited: shared metric tile and dashboard-card helpers

overpackedFirstLoadSections: Student Dashboard renders progress hero, next action, next steps, deadlines, full requirements, full feedback, progress/support, evidence forms, submitted work, and uploaded work by default.
Users & Access renders add-user form, current access summary, recent access history, all assignment forms, and repeated assign/remove guidance on first load.
Mentor Dashboard assigned-student rows render like mini dashboards with four signal boxes, activity text, next-step text, attention text, and two actions per row.

Site Dashboard and Admin Dashboard show metric grids and then repeat the same concepts as large Needs Attention, Program Breakdown, Status Breakdown, Mentor Coverage, Presentation Snapshot, Archive Snapshot, Audit, and Quick Action panels.
Program Teacher Dashboard shows seven metric cards and then repeats review, activity, program breakdown, and student-list surfaces as large panels.
The shared product header, site summary, role rail, and page hero repeat context labels on some role landings.
duplicateConceptsVisibleByDefault: No Mentor appears as a dashboard metric, Student Directory metric, Mentor Coverage detail, Mentor Assignments filter, Review Queue risk metric, and row chip.
Missing Evidence appears as Program Teacher/Review/Operations metrics and as directory/review filters.
Needs Review and Needs Revision repeat as dashboard metrics, review summary panels, student feedback/submission rows, and Review Queue filters.
Presentation Pending and Archive Ready/Failed repeat across dashboard metrics, Student Directory metrics, Operations metrics, and snapshot cards.
High Risk appears as dashboard top-risk rows, directory metrics, review filters, and operations attention.
Recent Activity, Access History, Feedback, Submission Timeline, Requirements, Deadlines, and Mentor Meeting Attention were useful but too often rendered as full default-open panels.
primaryWorkflowSurfacesToKeepVisible: Student: progress, one current priority, a short next-step/deadline list, and clear entry points to requirements, feedback, evidence, and submitted work.
Users & Access: current access summary, concise safety note, and the real create/access forms.
Mentor: assigned-student list with filters, one concise status summary per student, one primary student-detail action, and limited chips.
Site/Admin/Program: route-backed summary metrics that send users to the single best workflow destination.
Viewer/Administration: read-only boundary banner and monitoring entry points without mutation language.
secondarySurfacesToCollapseOrDeemphasize: Student requirement checklist, full feedback history, progress facts/support helper, evidence forms, submitted-work history, uploaded evidence list.
Users & Access recent history and detailed assign/remove guidance.
Dashboard program/status/mentor/presentation/archive/audit snapshots and broad quick-action panels.
Mentor row activity, meeting/presentation/outline/evidence signal grid, and meeting-history action.
Site permission rule cards and other explanatory helper panels.
primaryActions: Open the single next student requirement, add evidence, send draft/revision for review, open filtered staff worklists, open authorized student detail, save real access changes.
secondaryActions: View dashboard detail snapshots, open full feedback/submission timelines, open mentor meeting history, review access change history, inspect uploaded evidence lists, open broad quick action panels.
testsCurrentlyForcingClutter: tests/workspace-app.test.mjs expects all student requirement phases, feedback history, progress details, support actions, deadlines, submitted work, and evidence forms in the initial student markup.
tests/workspace-app.test.mjs expects Users & Access recent history before forms by default.
tests/workspace-app.test.mjs expects Mentor Dashboard signal grids, recent activity, next-step copy, and meeting history action in the default assigned-student row.
tests/workspace-app.test.mjs expects Site/Program dashboard detail actions in default output instead of opening a secondary dashboard disclosure first.
diagnosisBeforeEditing.densityVerifierTarget: Add scripts/verify-workspace-density.mjs and npm run verify:workspace-density to guard collapsed secondary panels, summary-only metric styling, duplicated default-visible dashboard detail grids, Users & Access history disclosure, student timeline duplication, fake-action language, and default metric/card budgets.

sourceOfTruthMatrix.primarySummaryLocation: Site/Program dashboard route-backed metric and Mentor Assignments coverage workflow
sourceOfTruthMatrix.primaryDestination: Student Directory missing-mentors or Mentor Assignments no-mentor filter
sourceOfTruthMatrix.compactOnlyLocations: Review Queue risk chip, Student Directory chip/count, dashboard detail disclosure
sourceOfTruthMatrix.avoidLargeRepeat: Do not render another large Mentor Coverage card by default next to the metric.

sourceOfTruthMatrix.primarySummaryLocation: Program Teacher or Operations route-backed metric
sourceOfTruthMatrix.primaryDestination: Student Directory missing-evidence or Review/Operations evidence-missing filters
sourceOfTruthMatrix.avoidLargeRepeat: Do not render a full missing-evidence panel on adjacent dashboards.

sourceOfTruthMatrix.compactOnlyLocations: student rows, feedback/submission badges, detail disclosure
sourceOfTruthMatrix.avoidLargeRepeat: Avoid default-open Review Workload cards when the metric already routes to Review Queue.

sourceOfTruthMatrix.primarySummaryLocation: Dashboard metric or student current priority
sourceOfTruthMatrix.primaryDestination: Review Queue revision filter or student feedback/submission detail
sourceOfTruthMatrix.compactOnlyLocations: status pills and student support entries
sourceOfTruthMatrix.avoidLargeRepeat: Avoid repeating revision as metric, paragraph, chip, and full panel in the same viewport.

sourceOfTruthMatrix.compactOnlyLocations: Student Directory count, Mentor Dashboard detail disclosure
sourceOfTruthMatrix.avoidLargeRepeat: Keep full presentation snapshots behind dashboard detail disclosure.

sourceOfTruthMatrix.primaryDestination: Operations archive-ready/failed filters or Archive Exports where available
sourceOfTruthMatrix.compactOnlyLocations: Student Directory count and student archive fact
sourceOfTruthMatrix.avoidLargeRepeat: Keep archive snapshots out of first-load dashboard walls.

sourceOfTruthMatrix.primarySummaryLocation: Student Directory/Review Queue filter and top-risk compact list
sourceOfTruthMatrix.primaryDestination: Student Directory high-risk filter or authorized student detail
sourceOfTruthMatrix.compactOnlyLocations: risk chips and Needs Attention disclosure
sourceOfTruthMatrix.avoidLargeRepeat: Avoid repeating high-risk as both metric and multiple large panels on the same load.

sourceOfTruthMatrix.primarySummaryLocation: Audit or Users & Access history disclosure
sourceOfTruthMatrix.primaryDestination: Audit route when authorized; Users & Access Recent changes disclosure for site access only
sourceOfTruthMatrix.avoidLargeRepeat: Do not default-open activity/history walls before the main workflow.

sourceOfTruthMatrix.compactOnlyLocations: latest feedback line, status pill, timeline action
sourceOfTruthMatrix.avoidLargeRepeat: Only one timeline is open for the selected submission and source.

sourceOfTruthMatrix.primarySummaryLocation: Student current priority plus short deadlines/next steps
sourceOfTruthMatrix.primaryDestination: In-page requirements disclosure and requirement detail state
sourceOfTruthMatrix.compactOnlyLocations: summary counts and top deadline rows
sourceOfTruthMatrix.avoidLargeRepeat: Do not render all phases and every requirement on first load.

sourceOfTruthMatrix.primarySummaryLocation: Mentor filter counts and compact assigned-student summary
sourceOfTruthMatrix.primaryDestination: Mentor Dashboard filter or authorized student-detail Mentor tab
sourceOfTruthMatrix.compactOnlyLocations: row chips and one expandable details area
sourceOfTruthMatrix.avoidLargeRepeat: Assigned-student rows should not be mini dashboards by default.

sectionsConsolidated: Student Dashboard now keeps the progress hero, one primary next action, a short next-step list, and up to three deadlines visible before secondary disclosures.
Users & Access now keeps a concise safety note, current assignments, and real management forms visible while moving recent history and long guidance behind disclosure.
Mentor Dashboard assigned-student rows now render compact summaries, chips, and the primary detail action; signal grid, activity, next step, and meeting-history action are disclosed per row.

Site, Admin, and Program dashboards now keep route-backed metrics and attention summaries visible while moving repeated program/status/mentor/presentation/archive/detail cards behind dashboard detail disclosure.
Workspace shell/header spacing was compacted to reduce repeated context height while preserving role, site, year, and read-only context.
sectionsCollapsedBehindDisclosure: Student requirements, feedback, progress/support, evidence tools, submitted work, and uploaded/linked files.
Users & Access recent access changes and Assign/Remove role guidance.
Program Teacher Dashboard needs-review/activity/program/student detail panels.
featuresPreserved: Student requirement open-detail, phase focus, add-evidence focus, send-for-review, feedback timeline, submission timeline, file download, and external-link actions.
Users & Access active assignment summary and existing create/access assignment forms.
Mentor Dashboard filters, student detail drawer, meeting-history entry, and mentor meeting form path.
Dashboard route-backed metric destinations for Student Directory, Review Queue, Mentor Assignments, Operations, and Presentation.
Viewer and Administration read-only boundaries, permission-denied states, and no mutation controls.
testsVerifiersUpdated: tests/workspace-app.test.mjs now opens dashboard, student, users-access, and mentor-row disclosures before asserting secondary content.
tests/functionality-language-audit.test.mjs now requires the density verifier and package script.
scripts/verify-workspace-density.mjs added with npm script verify:workspace-density.

validation.status: passed with CRLF normalization warnings only

knownRemainingViewabilityIssues: No known remaining first-load density issue from the 10-item prompt gate; hosted visual click-through still needs a credentialed runtime when allowed.
nextRecommendedTarget: Run hosted role click-through proof when allowed; otherwise use verify:workspace-density before the next workspace layout/dashboard slice.

final.commit: pending closeout commit: ux: reduce workspace density and duplicate panels
